economic_notes: First Nation owns 99.99% of Zazega Akiins Land and Resources LP (Motel 6 hotel development) and 24.99% of Agency One LP (reserve land management). Undrawn credit capacity of $10,425,191 under community development loan agreement with Peace Hills Trust. Resource sharing agreement with Rainy River District First Nation Trust. OFNLP distributions from Casino Rama profits restricted to community development, health, education, economic development and cultural development.
notes: Province is Ontario (ON) based on auditor location in Fort Frances, Ontario. Trust fund revenue dropped significantly from $11,597,336 in 2023 to $3,714,636 in 2024; the 2023 figure was unusually high likely due to a large resource sharing distribution, making 2023 a high-surplus year ($13.7M). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Zazega Akiins Land and Resources LP (99.99% owned, Motel 6 hotel) and Agency One LP (24.99% owned). One fully consolidated subsidiary: 1468069 Ontario Limited o/a Gobe Corporation. No schedule of remuneration was included in the extracted text. Long-term debt includes $40,000 CMHC demand note and $3,446,507 in term loans. TCA net book value includes $23,545,918 in amortizable assets plus $575,080 under construction. Annual debt service represents scheduled 2025 principal repayment on term loans only.
